chapter_title.ar: بَابُ حَصَى الْجِمَارِ مِنْ أَيْنَ تُؤْخَذُ وَ مِقْدَارِهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 172 – The pebbles (for pelting) Al-Jamarahah, from where should these be taken, and their quantity

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/141)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/141)
text: خُذْ حَصَى الْجِمَارِ مِنْ جَمْعٍ وَ إِنْ أَخَذْتَهُ مِنْ رَحْلِكَ بِمِنًى أَجْزَأَكَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad, from Rabie,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Take the pebbles (for pelting) Al-Jamarah, from Jam’a (place of assembly near Muzdalifah); and if you were to take from your departure in Mina, it would suffice you’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Hammad from Rib’iy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Take the pebbles for al-Jamar from Jam‘ and if you take them from your lodging in Mina’ is also sufficient.’”
